boxing.title: Private Boxing & Elite Personal Training NYC | A1 Training Group
boxing.description: Experience NYC's #1 concierge fitness service. Bespoke boxing, kettlebell training, and physical therapy delivered to your luxury condo or private studio. From Tribeca to the Upper East Side, our elite coaches provide discrete, high-performance results for busy executives and professionals.
boxing.title_es: Boxeo Privado y Entrenamiento Personal de Élite en NYC | A1 Training Group
boxing.description_es: Experimenta el servicio de fitness concierge #1 de NYC. Boxeo a medida, entrenamiento con kettlebell y terapia física entregados en tu condominio de lujo o estudio privado.

kettlebell.title: Elite Kettlebell Training NYC | Private In-Home Kettlebell Course
kettlebell.description: Experience NYC's #1 private kettlebell course. Our elite mobile trainers bring Hardstyle (RKC/StrongFirst) coaching to your Manhattan home or luxury condo. Perfect for busy executives seeking strength, longevity, and postural correction.
kettlebell.title_es: Entrenamiento de Kettlebell de Élite en NYC | Curso Privado de Kettlebell a Domicilio
kettlebell.description_es: Experimenta el curso privado de kettlebell #1 de NYC. Nuestros entrenadores móviles de élite llevan coaching Hardstyle (RKC/StrongFirst) a tu hogar o condominio de lujo en Manhattan.

massage-therapy.title: Best Massage Therapy New York | Elite Recovery & Sports Massage NYC
massage-therapy.description: Experience NYC's premier professional massage therapy services. From sports massage for athletes to executive decompression, A1 Training Group brings white-glove recovery to your luxury Manhattan home or our private studio.
massage-therapy.title_es: La Mejor Terapia de Masaje en Nueva York | Recuperación de Élite y Masaje Deportivo NYC
massage-therapy.description_es: Experimenta los servicios premier de terapia de masaje profesional en NYC. Desde masaje deportivo para atletas hasta descompresión ejecutiva. Servicio de recuperación de guante blanco.

physical-therapy.title: Elite Physical Therapy & Recovery NYC | A1 Training Group Manhattan
physical-therapy.description: Experience NYC's premier concierge physical therapy and recovery. A1 Training Group provides bespoke rehabilitation, longevity coaching, and private strength training for busy executives in Tribeca, Chelsea, and the UES. White-glove service in-studio or at your luxury home.
physical-therapy.title_es: Terapia Física de Élite y Recuperación en NYC | A1 Training Group Manhattan
physical-therapy.description_es: Experimenta la terapia física concierge premier de NYC. A1 Training Group ofrece rehabilitación personalizada, coaching de longevidad y entrenamiento de fuerza privado para ejecutivos ocupados.
